readmeAlignment.sourceTruth: projection-ready from current scan and story review

canonicalSurfaces.legacy_or_alternate_surfaces: bin/taxonomy-report.js, bin/taxonomy-scan.js, bin/verify-scan-fixture.js, bin/verify-scan-validator.js, bin/verify-scan.js, bin/verify-scan.test.js
canonicalSurfaces.relationship: canonical renderer with CLI and verification surfaces
canonicalSurfaces.boundary_evidence: CLI and verification surfaces exercise scanner entry points; renderer remains canonical report owner.

canonicalSurfaces.relationship: canonical sibling surface for run progress and summary reporting
canonicalSurfaces.boundary_evidence: Swarm report owns taxonomy-healing batch observability; run report surfaces own generic run routing/progress views.
Obsolete story report entry points were retired; no alternate story-review surface remains.

canonicalSurfaces.relationship: orchestration boundary distinct from direct anchor mutation utilities
canonicalSurfaces.boundary_evidence: Heal-run owns governed lifecycle/reporting; taxonomy-heal and update-anchors are lower-level mutation utilities.

canonicalSurfaces.relationship: worker-local reporting stack distinct from global observability
canonicalSurfaces.boundary_evidence: Worker report modules own worker-local assembly/formatting/telemetry; global observability owns operator-level scan and swarm reports.

aiReviewRules: Cite packet fields by path or key.
If evidence is missing, mark review_required.
Do not recommend mutation unless the packet identifies a concrete failing gate.
Keep local taxonomy truth separate from whole-codebase story truth.
